first_run.rationale: The evaluation score is identical (6/10), and the core reasoning across both versions is consistent. Both evaluations highlight the same primary strengths (AI-agent work, high-throughput systems) and the same primary concerns (no Python, limited strategic evidence). The minor differences in phrasing and the substitution of one secondary concern for another are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect a substantive change in assessment based on the location change.
